prompt: Create a data table component in Next.js with shadcn/ui that displays a list of users (name, email, role, status). Add column sorting by clicking headers, and a dropdown menu on each row for actions (Edit, Delete, View Profile). Use TypeScript with proper types. Include some sample data.
assertions: Uses shadcn/ui Table components (Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell)
Uses shadcn/ui DropdownMenu for row actions
Includes TypeScript interface or type for the user data
Implements sorting logic for at least one column
